title: Fast Fiction Factory Review Procedure Lock
purpose: Focused local Review Hub procedure improvement that fixes what to open, what screenshot/contact-sheet evidence represents, what each mode is for, when review is optional or required, and where identity/access paths live while preserving source-span/model-boundary evidence without starting model/API work.
generated_from: User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward

if ($manifest.preserved_source_span_artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') { throw 'Preserved source-span artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_model_api_boundary_artifact_id -ne 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001') { throw 'Preserved model/API boundary artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('fff-review-procedure-lock-001', 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001', 'Story Review', 'Source Audit', 'Project Cockpit', 'Artifacts', 'docs/review/review-procedure.md', 'artifacts/review-procedure-lock-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png', 'artifacts/review-screens/story-review.png', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1', 'scripts/operator/open_review.sh', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001', 'externalCallAllowed: false', 'data-review-mode="story"', 'data-mode-target="source"', 'data-mode-panel="source"') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; if ($html -match 'position:\s*sticky') { throw 'Unexpected sticky positioning remains' }; if ($html -match '<details class="source-span-fixture" open') { throw 'Source-span fixtures must not default open' }; $procedure = Get-Content docs/review/review-procedure.md -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('What To Open', 'What The Screenshots Represent', 'Optional Vs Required Review', 'Freeform Review Intake', 'Review Debt', 'Completion Signal') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $procedure.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing review procedure section: ' + $_) } }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($item.Length -lt 1024) { throw ('Visual evidence too small: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Review procedure lock validation passed' }
